name.en: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
name.hi: महात्मा गांधी राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी अधिनियम

benefit.en: Up to 100 days of guaranteed wage employment per financial year per rural household for adult members willing to do unskilled manual work
benefit.hi: ग्रामीण परिवार के वयस्क सदस्यों के लिए प्रति वित्तीय वर्ष 100 दिन तक का गारंटीशुदा अकुशल मजदूरी रोजगार

eligibility_rules_human: Adult member (18+) of a rural household willing to do unskilled manual work; the household must apply for and obtain a job card from the Gram Panchayat.

offline_steps: Apply to Gram Panchayat for a job card
Job card issued within 15 days of valid application
Apply for work; wages paid within 15 days of work completion
